codeReview.summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `87f0a98`. The diff is limited to `src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.test.tsx`, where seven focused tests were added for the remaining hotkey-subscription and native-sync assertions. Those tests line up with the existing implementation in `src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.tsx`, while the already-present `useAutoScroll` and `viewportMath` source/tests cover the auto-scroll and viewport-math requirements from VAL-TELE-016 through VAL-TELE-019. I did not find a correctness or regression issue in the reviewed feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Workers keep attempting to read `.factory/library/README.md`, but the shared library has no README/index file. That forces workers to discover the available library docs by listing the directory instead of having a single entry point.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The transcript skeleton at `C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\worker-transcripts.jsonl:22` includes `Read D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\library\README.md`, while `D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\library` currently contains only `architecture.md`, `environment.md`, and `user-testing.md`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `frontend-redesign` skill procedure is out of sync with how this verification-heavy feature was actually executed and reported. The skill requires invoking `frontend-design` at session start and doing an explicit RED phase, but this worker transcript shows neither, while the handoff still reports `followedProcedure: true` and only notes the mismatch in suggested changes.

In `C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\worker-transcripts.jsonl:22`, the session shows `mission-worker-base`, later `frontend-redesign`, and baseline validation before the skill invocation, with no `frontend-design` invocation. The handoff at `C:\Users\mitte\.factory\missions\fe650437-0d94-4ece-8085-ac6da736d0ec\handoffs\2026-04-10T16-03-01-293Z__teleprompter-autoscroll-viewportmath-hotkeys-sync__21669374-45fc-40ed-930c-09177965b850.json:93-97` still records `"followedProcedure": true` while also suggesting the RED-phase guidance should be relaxed for verification-focused features.

summary: Pass: commit `87f0a98` adds the missing TeleprompterView coverage for hotkey subscription/cleanup and native move-sync coalescing, and the reviewed implementation satisfies the feature's auto-scroll, viewport-math, hotkey, and native-sync behavior.
